mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 5% increase in industrial production over the next 3 months signals a strengthening demand environment that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO increases by > 5% over the next 3 months
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in strengthening demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the unemployment rate below 4.5% signals a tightening labor market that compresses wage growth and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE falls below 4.5% over the next 3 months
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening labor market periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 10% increase in housing starts over the next 6 months signals a strengthening supply environment that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST increases by > 10% over the next 6 months
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in strengthening supply periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 50-basis-point increase in the federal funds rate over the next 2 months signals a tightening monetary cycle that compresses equity valuations and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS increases by > 50bp over the next 2 months
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening monetary periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 10% decline in industrial production over the next 3 months signals a weakening demand environment that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO declines by > 10% over the next 3 months
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in weakening demand periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the unemployment rate above 6% signals a loosening labor market that expands wage growth and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises above 6% over the next 3 months
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in loosening labor market periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 20% decline in housing starts over the next 6 months signals a weakening supply environment that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST declines by > 20% over the next 6 months
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in weakening supply periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
